---
title: Security
description: Payment verification and settlement security model.
---

# Security

TakPay treats payment verification as a backend responsibility.

## Main protections

- On-chain transaction lookup through Arc RPC
- Recipient verification
- Amount verification
- Token contract verification
- Transaction receipt confirmation
- Replay protection for tx hashes
- Atomic invoice status update
- Webhook SSRF guard
- HMAC webhook signatures
- Merchant entitlement checks for payouts

## Common threats

### Fake transaction hash

A customer submits a random hash. TakPay rejects it if the transaction does not exist or is not confirmed.

### Wrong recipient

A customer sends funds to another address. TakPay rejects it because recipient does not match invoice.

### Insufficient amount

A customer sends less than requested. TakPay rejects it because amount is lower than invoice amount.

### Replay attack

A customer reuses one valid tx hash for multiple invoices. TakPay blocks this with tx hash uniqueness checks.

### Payout abuse

A merchant attempts to withdraw more than earned. TakPay tracks paid invoices and previous payouts before transfer.
